languages.text: {n}Генетор говорит быстро, так, что слова почти сливаются в неразборчивый гул.{/n} "Лорд-капитан, работа Сектора Бионика частично парализована. Генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус единолично экспериментирует с имплантационным троном, заимствуя Движущую Силу из контура отсека, что препятствует корректному отправлению таинства аугментации".

{n}The Genetor speaks rapidly, his words almost merging into an indistinct buzz.{/n} "Lord Captain, operations in the Sector Bionica have practically stalled. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs is unilaterally experimenting with the implantation throne, drawing the Motive Force from the compartment's circuitry and thereby hindering proper administration of the augmentation rite."
languages.original_text: {n}Генетор говорит быстро, так, что слова почти сливаются в неразборчивый гул.{/n} "Лорд-капитан, работа Сектора Бионика частично парализована. Генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус единолично экспериментирует с имплантационным троном, заимствуя Движущую Силу из контура отсека, что препятствует корректному отправлению таинства аугментации".

Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs is unilaterally experimenting with an implantation throne, drawing the Motive Force from the compartment's circuitry, thereby hindering the proper administration of the augmentation rite."

{n}The Genetor speaks rapidly, his words almost merging into an indistinct buzz.{/n} "Lord Captain, operations in the Sector Bionica have practically stalled. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs is unilaterally experimenting with the implantation throne, drawing the Motive Force from the compartment's circuitry and thereby hindering proper administration of the augmentation rite."

{n}The Genetor speaks rapidly, his words almost merging into an indecipherable hum.{/n} "Lord Captain, Sector Bionica operations have been partially paralysed. Genetor Extremis Eo-gann Februs has been unilaterally conducting experiments using the sacred machine, which is hindering the correct administering of the sacrament of augmentation."

{n}The Genetor speaks rapidly, his words nearly merging into an indistinct drone.{/n} "Lord Captain, operations in the Sector Bionica are partially paralysed. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs is unilaterally experimenting with an implantation throne, drawing the Motive Force from the compartment's circuitry, thereby hindering the proper administration of the augmentation rite."

{n}The Genetor speaks rapidly, his words almost merging into an indistinct buzz.{/n} "Lord Captain, operations in the Sector Bionica have practically stalled. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs is unilaterally experimenting with the implantation throne, drawing the Motive Force from the compartment's circuitry and thereby hindering proper administration of the augmentation rite."

languages.text: {n}基因士语速极快，字句几乎连成一串难以分辨的嗡鸣。{/n}“舰长大人，仿生区的运作几乎瘫痪。特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯一直擅自占用移植王座进行实验，从舱室回路中抽取源力，这严重妨碍了植入物圣礼的正常执行。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor speaks rapidly, his words almost merging into an indistinct buzz.{/n} "Lord Captain, operations in the Sector Bionica have practically stalled. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs is unilaterally experimenting with the implantation throne, drawing the Motive Force from the compartment's circuitry and thereby hindering proper administration of the augmentation rite."

traits.locale_text: {n}基因士语速极快，字句几乎连成一串难以分辨的嗡鸣。{/n}“舰长大人，仿生区的运作几乎瘫痪。特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯一直擅自占用移植王座进行实验，从舱室回路中抽取源力，这严重妨碍了植入物圣礼的正常执行。”

languages.text: {n}El genetor habla a gran velocidad y sus palabras casi forman un zumbido incomprensible.{/n} «Lord Capitán, las operaciones en el Sector Bionica prácticamente están detenidas. El genetor extremis Eogunn Februs experimenta de forma unilateral con el trono de implantación, extrayendo Fuerza Motriz de los circuitos del compartimento y por lo tanto impidiendo la correcta administración del rito de aumento».
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor speaks rapidly, his words almost merging into an indistinct buzz.{/n} "Lord Captain, operations in the Sector Bionica have practically stalled. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs is unilaterally experimenting with the implantation throne, drawing the Motive Force from the compartment's circuitry and thereby hindering proper administration of the augmentation rite."

traits.locale_text: {n}El genetor habla a gran velocidad y sus palabras casi forman un zumbido incomprensible.{/n} «Lord Capitán, las operaciones en el Sector Bionica prácticamente están detenidas. El genetor extremis Eogunn Februs experimenta de forma unilateral con el trono de implantación, extrayendo Fuerza Motriz de los circuitos del compartimento y por lo tanto impidiendo la correcta administración del rito de aumento».

languages.text: {n}Le débit du genetor est rapide, et ses mots se chevauchent jusqu'à en devenir incompréhensibles.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, les opérations du secteur Bionica sont en partie à l'arrêt. Le genetor extremis Eogunn Februs a, de son propre chef, pris la décision de mener des expériences avec le fauteuil d'implantation en puisant la Force Motrice dans les circuits du compartiment, ce qui interfère avec le rite d'augmentation. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor speaks rapidly, his words almost merging into an indistinct buzz.{/n} "Lord Captain, operations in the Sector Bionica have practically stalled. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs is unilaterally experimenting with the implantation throne, drawing the Motive Force from the compartment's circuitry and thereby hindering proper administration of the augmentation rite."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le débit du genetor est rapide, et ses mots se chevauchent jusqu'à en devenir incompréhensibles.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, les opérations du secteur Bionica sont en partie à l'arrêt. Le genetor extremis Eogunn Februs a, de son propre chef, pris la décision de mener des expériences avec le fauteuil d'implantation en puisant la Force Motrice dans les circuits du compartiment, ce qui interfère avec le rite d'augmentation. »

languages.text: {n}Genetör hızla konuşuyor, kelimeleri neredeyse belirsiz bir vızıltıya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan, Sektör Biyonika'daki operasyonlar neredeyse durma noktasına geldi. Genetör Extremis Eogunn Februs; tek taraflı olarak implantasyon tahtıyla deneyler yapıyor, bölmenin devrelerinden Devinim Gücü çekiyor ve böylece ogmentasyon ayininin uygun şekilde idare edilmesini engelliyor."
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor speaks rapidly, his words almost merging into an indistinct buzz.{/n} "Lord Captain, operations in the Sector Bionica have practically stalled. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs is unilaterally experimenting with the implantation throne, drawing the Motive Force from the compartment's circuitry and thereby hindering proper administration of the augmentation rite."

traits.locale_text: {n}Genetör hızla konuşuyor, kelimeleri neredeyse belirsiz bir vızıltıya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan, Sektör Biyonika'daki operasyonlar neredeyse durma noktasına geldi. Genetör Extremis Eogunn Februs; tek taraflı olarak implantasyon tahtıyla deneyler yapıyor, bölmenin devrelerinden Devinim Gücü çekiyor ve böylece ogmentasyon ayininin uygun şekilde idare edilmesini engelliyor."

languages.text: {n}Der Genetor spricht schnell. Seine Worte verschmelzen beinahe zu einem unverständlichen Summen.{/n} "Lord Captain, sämtliche Operationen im Sektor Bionica sind praktisch zum Stillstand gekommen. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs experimentiert eigenmächtig mit dem Implantationsthron. Dabei zieht er die Antriebskraft aus den Schaltkreisen des Moduls ab und verhindert die ordnungsgemäße Durchführung des Augmentationsrituals."
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor speaks rapidly, his words almost merging into an indistinct buzz.{/n} "Lord Captain, operations in the Sector Bionica have practically stalled. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs is unilaterally experimenting with the implantation throne, drawing the Motive Force from the compartment's circuitry and thereby hindering proper administration of the augmentation rite."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Genetor spricht schnell. Seine Worte verschmelzen beinahe zu einem unverständlichen Summen.{/n} "Lord Captain, sämtliche Operationen im Sektor Bionica sind praktisch zum Stillstand gekommen. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs experimentiert eigenmächtig mit dem Implantationsthron. Dabei zieht er die Antriebskraft aus den Schaltkreisen des Moduls ab und verhindert die ordnungsgemäße Durchführung des Augmentationsrituals."

languages.text: ジェネーターは早口で、彼の言葉はほとんど解読不能な唸り声に溶け込んでいく。「キャプテン様、バイオニカセクターの活動は部分的に麻痺しています。ジェネーター・エクストレミス・イオガン・フェブルスが聖なる機械を用いて一方的に実験を行っており、増幅の聖典の正しい授与を妨げています。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor speaks rapidly, his words almost merging into an indecipherable hum.{/n} "Lord Captain, Sector Bionica operations have been partially paralysed. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has been unilaterally conducting experiments using the sacred machine, which is hindering the correct administering of the sacrament of augmentation."

traits.locale_text: ジェネーターは早口で、彼の言葉はほとんど解読不能な唸り声に溶け込んでいく。「キャプテン様、バイオニカセクターの活動は部分的に麻痺しています。ジェネーター・エクストレミス・イオ・ガン・フェブルスが聖なる機械を用いて一方的に実験を行っており、増幅の聖典の正しい授与を妨げています。」
